+name: Pact Manual
+
+on:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      pact_mode:
+        description: "Pact run mode"
+        required: true
+        default: "quick"
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - quick
+          - full
+      pact_target:
+        description: "Optional Pact target. Use a spec glob like **/auth.pact.spec.ts or a grep pattern."
+        required: false
+        type: string
+      target_mode:
+        description: "Interpret pact_target as match or grep."
+        required: true
+        default: "match"
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - match
+          - grep
+
+jobs:
+  pact-manual:
+    name: Pact manual run
+    timeout-minutes: 60
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version-file: .nvmrc
+          cache: npm
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Install Playwright Browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps
+
+      - name: Run Pact suite manually
+        id: pact_manual
+        env:
+          LT_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.LT_USERNAME }}
+          LT_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.LT_ACCESS_KEY }}
+          E2E_TEST_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_EMAIL }}
+          E2E_TEST_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_PASSWORD }}
+          PACT_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS: '600000'
+          PACT_TEST_MATCH: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_mode == 'match' && github.event.inputs.pact_target || '' }}
+          PACT_TEST_GREP: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_mode == 'grep' && github.event.inputs.pact_target || '' }}
+        run: |
+          if [ "${{ github.event.inputs.pact_mode }}" = "quick" ] && [ -z "${{ github.event.inputs.pact_target }}" ]; then
+            npm run test:playwright:pact:quick
+          else
+            npm run test:playwright:pact
+          fi
+
+      - name: Add manual summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          {
+            echo "## Pact manual run"
+            echo ""
+            echo "- Mode: ${{ github.event.inputs.pact_mode }}"
+            echo "- Target mode: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_mode }}"
+            echo "- Target: ${{ github.event.inputs.pact_target || 'default' }}"
+            echo "- Result: ${{ steps.pact_manual.outcome }}"
+            echo "- Report artifact: playwright-report-manual"
+            echo "- Pact artifact: pact-files-manual"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: playwright-report-manual
+          path: playwright-report/
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-files-manual
+          path: e2e/playwright/pacts/
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30

+name: Pact Scheduled
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 6 * * *'
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  pact-scheduled:
+    name: Pact scheduled/full run
+    timeout-minutes: 60
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version-file: .nvmrc
+          cache: npm
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Install Playwright Browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps
+
+      - name: Run full Pact suite
+        id: pact_scheduled
+        env:
+          LT_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.LT_USERNAME }}
+          LT_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.LT_ACCESS_KEY }}
+          E2E_TEST_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_EMAIL }}
+          E2E_TEST_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_PASSWORD }}
+          PACT_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS: '600000'
+          PACT_REPORT_CHANNEL: nightly
+          PACT_REPORT_ENVIRONMENT: qa
+          GITHUB_RUN_URL: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
+          GITHUB_REF_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
+          GITHUB_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
+        run: npm run test:playwright:pact:report
+
+      - name: Build summary markdown
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        env:
+          SUMMARY_JSON_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+          SUMMARY_MD_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md
+          SUMMARY_HTML_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html
+        run: node ./scripts/build-summary-md.js
+
+      - name: Validate summary contract
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        env:
+          SUMMARY_JSON_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+        run: node ./scripts/validate-summary-contract.js
+        
+      - name: Read Pact summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        id: pact_summary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          if [ -f e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json ]; then
+            node -e "
+              const fs = require('fs');
+              const summary = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json', 'utf8'));
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`status=\${summary.status || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`service=\${summary.service || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`lane=\${summary.lane || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`channel=\${summary.channel || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`testsRun=\${summary.testsRun ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`failures=\${summary.failures ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`errors=\${summary.errors ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`durationSeconds=\${summary.durationSeconds ?? 0}\n\`);
+            "
+          else
+            echo "status=missing" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "service=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "lane=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "channel=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "testsRun=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "failures=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "errors=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "durationSeconds=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Checkout qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          repository: JavierNaranjo-BD/qa-dashboards
+          token: ${{ secrets.QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN }}
+          ref: gh-pages
+          path: qa-dashboards
+
+      - name: Publish latest nightly summary and artifacts to qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -e
+
+          TARGET_DIR="qa-dashboards/latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly"
+          ARTIFACTS_DIR="$TARGET_DIR/artifacts"
+
+          mkdir -p "$ARTIFACTS_DIR"
+
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json "$TARGET_DIR/summary.json"
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md "$TARGET_DIR/summary.md"
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html "$TARGET_DIR/summary.html"
+
+          if [ -f e2e/playwright/pact/results.json ]; then
+            cp e2e/playwright/pact/results.json "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/results.json"
+          fi
+
+          if [ -d playwright-report ]; then
+            rm -rf "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/playwright-report"
+            cp -R playwright-report "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/playwright-report"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Commit and push qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        working-directory: qa-dashboards
+        shell: bash
+        env:
+          QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          node ./scripts/build-latest-index.js
+
+          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+          git add latest/index.json
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/summary.json
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/summary.md
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/summary.html
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/artifacts/results.json
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/artifacts/playwright-report
+          git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "chore: update pact nightly latest for front-customer-workspace"
+          git remote set-url origin https://x-access-token:${QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN}@github.com/JavierNaranjo-BD/qa-dashboards.git
+          git push origin HEAD:gh-pages
+
+      - name: Add scheduled summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          {
+            echo "## Pact full run"
+            echo ""
+            echo "- Trigger: ${{ github.event_name }}"
+            echo "- Result: ${{ steps.pact_scheduled.outcome }}"
+            echo "- Status: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.status }}"
+            echo "- Service: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.service }}"
+            echo "- Lane: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.lane }}"
+            echo "- Channel: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.channel }}"
+            echo "- Tests run: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.testsRun }}"
+            echo "- Failures: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.failures }}"
+            echo "- Errors: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.errors }}"
+            echo "- Duration (s): ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.durationSeconds }}"
+            echo "- Report artifact: playwright-report-full"
+            echo "- Pact artifact: pact-files-full"
+            echo "- Summary artifact: pact-summary-full"
+            echo "- Mirror path: latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: playwright-report-full
+          path: playwright-report/
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-files-full
+          path: e2e/playwright/pacts/
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-summary-full
+          path: |
+            e2e/playwright/pact/results.json
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30

+name: Pact PR Signal
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main, master, uat]
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  pact-pr-signal:
+    name: Pact PR signal (non-blocking)
+    continue-on-error: true
+    timeout-minutes: 60
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version-file: .nvmrc
+          cache: npm
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Install Playwright Browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps
+
+      - name: Run Pact suite for PR signal
+        id: pact_pr
+        continue-on-error: true
+        env:
+          LT_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.LT_USERNAME }}
+          LT_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.LT_ACCESS_KEY }}
+          E2E_TEST_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_EMAIL }}
+          E2E_TEST_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_PASSWORD }}
+          PACT_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS: '600000'
+          PACT_REPORT_CHANNEL: pr
+          PACT_REPORT_ENVIRONMENT: qa
+          GITHUB_RUN_URL: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
+          GITHUB_REF_NAME: ${{ github.head_ref || github.ref_name }}
+          GITHUB_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
+        run: |
+          npm run test:playwright:pact:quick
+          npm run test:playwright:pact:summary
+
+      - name: Build summary markdown
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        env:
+          SUMMARY_JSON_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+          SUMMARY_MD_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md
+          SUMMARY_HTML_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html
+        run: node ./scripts/build-summary-md.js
+
+      - name: Validate summary contract
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        env:
+          SUMMARY_JSON_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+        run: node ./scripts/validate-summary-contract.js
+
+      - name: Read Pact summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        id: pact_summary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          if [ -f e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json ]; then
+            node -e "

+              const summary = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json', 'utf8'));
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`status=\${summary.status || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`service=\${summary.service || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`lane=\${summary.lane || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`channel=\${summary.channel || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`testsRun=\${summary.testsRun ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`failures=\${summary.failures ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`errors=\${summary.errors ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`durationSeconds=\${summary.durationSeconds ?? 0}\n\`);
+            "
+          else
+            echo "status=missing" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "service=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "lane=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "channel=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "testsRun=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "failures=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "errors=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "durationSeconds=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Checkout qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          repository: JavierNaranjo-BD/qa-dashboards
+          token: ${{ secrets.QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN }}
+          ref: gh-pages
+          path: qa-dashboards
+
+      - name: Publish latest PR summary and artifacts to qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash

+          set -e
+
+          TARGET_DIR="qa-dashboards/latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/pr"
+          ARTIFACTS_DIR="$TARGET_DIR/artifacts"
+
+          mkdir -p "$ARTIFACTS_DIR"
+
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json "$TARGET_DIR/summary.json"
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md "$TARGET_DIR/summary.md"
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html "$TARGET_DIR/summary.html"
+
+          if [ -f e2e/playwright/pact/results.json ]; then
+            cp e2e/playwright/pact/results.json "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/results.json"
+          fi
+
+          if [ -d playwright-report ]; then
+            rm -rf "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/playwright-report"
+            cp -R playwright-report "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/playwright-report"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Commit and push qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        working-directory: qa-dashboards
+        shell: bash
+        env:
+          QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN }}
+        run: |

+
+          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+          git add latest/index.json

+          git remote set-url origin https://x-access-token:${QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN}@github.com/JavierNaranjo-BD/qa-dashboards.git
+          git push origin HEAD:gh-pages
+
+      - name: Add PR summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          {
+            echo "## Pact PR signal"
+            echo ""
+            echo "- Blocking: no"
+            echo "- Mode: quick (auth contracts)"
+            echo "- Result: ${{ steps.pact_pr.outcome }}"
+            echo "- Status: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.status }}"
+            echo "- Service: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.service }}"
+            echo "- Lane: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.lane }}"
+            echo "- Channel: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.channel }}"
+            echo "- Tests run: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.testsRun }}"
+            echo "- Failures: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.failures }}"
+            echo "- Errors: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.errors }}"
+            echo "- Duration (s): ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.durationSeconds }}"
+            echo "- Report artifact: playwright-report-pr"
+            echo "- Pact artifact: pact-files-pr"
+            echo "- Summary artifact: pact-summary-pr"
+            echo "- Mirror path: latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/pr/"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: playwright-report-pr
+          path: playwright-report/
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-files-pr
+          path: e2e/playwright/pacts/
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-summary-pr
+          path: |
+            e2e/playwright/pact/results.json
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30

+name: Pact Manual
+
+on:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      pact_mode:
+        description: "Pact run mode"
+        required: true
+        default: "quick"
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - quick
+          - full
+      pact_target:
+        description: "Optional Pact target. Use a spec glob like **/auth.pact.spec.ts or a grep pattern."
+        required: false
+        type: string
+      target_mode:
+        description: "Interpret pact_target as match or grep."
+        required: true
+        default: "match"
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - match
+          - grep
+
+jobs:
+  pact-manual:
+    name: Pact manual run
+    timeout-minutes: 60
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version-file: .nvmrc
+          cache: npm
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Install Playwright Browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps
+
+      - name: Run Pact suite manually
+        id: pact_manual
+        env:
+          LT_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.LT_USERNAME }}
+          LT_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.LT_ACCESS_KEY }}
+          E2E_TEST_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_EMAIL }}
+          E2E_TEST_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_PASSWORD }}
+          PACT_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS: '600000'
+          PACT_TEST_MATCH: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_mode == 'match' && github.event.inputs.pact_target || '' }}
+          PACT_TEST_GREP: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_mode == 'grep' && github.event.inputs.pact_target || '' }}
+        run: |
+          if [ "${{ github.event.inputs.pact_mode }}" = "quick" ] && [ -z "${{ github.event.inputs.pact_target }}" ]; then
+            npm run test:playwright:pact:quick
+          else
+            npm run test:playwright:pact
+          fi
+
+      - name: Add manual summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          {
+            echo "## Pact manual run"
+            echo ""
+            echo "- Mode: ${{ github.event.inputs.pact_mode }}"
+            echo "- Target mode: ${{ github.event.inputs.target_mode }}"
+            echo "- Target: ${{ github.event.inputs.pact_target || 'default' }}"
+            echo "- Result: ${{ steps.pact_manual.outcome }}"
+            echo "- Report artifact: playwright-report-manual"
+            echo "- Pact artifact: pact-files-manual"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: playwright-report-manual
+          path: playwright-report/
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-files-manual
+          path: e2e/playwright/pacts/
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30

+name: Pact Scheduled
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 6 * * *'
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+jobs:
+  pact-scheduled:
+    name: Pact scheduled/full run
+    timeout-minutes: 60
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version-file: .nvmrc
+          cache: npm
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Install Playwright Browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps
+
+      - name: Run full Pact suite
+        id: pact_scheduled
+        env:
+          LT_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.LT_USERNAME }}
+          LT_ACCESS_KEY: ${{ secrets.LT_ACCESS_KEY }}
+          E2E_TEST_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_EMAIL }}
+          E2E_TEST_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.E2E_TEST_PASSWORD }}
+          PACT_NAVIGATION_TIMEOUT_MS: '600000'
+          PACT_REPORT_CHANNEL: nightly
+          PACT_REPORT_ENVIRONMENT: qa
+          GITHUB_RUN_URL: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
+          GITHUB_REF_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
+          GITHUB_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
+        run: npm run test:playwright:pact:report
+
+      - name: Build summary markdown
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        env:
+          SUMMARY_JSON_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+          SUMMARY_MD_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md
+          SUMMARY_HTML_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html
+        run: node ./scripts/build-summary-md.js
+
+      - name: Validate summary contract
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        env:
+          SUMMARY_JSON_PATH: ${{ github.workspace }}/e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+        run: node ./scripts/validate-summary-contract.js
+        
+      - name: Read Pact summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        id: pact_summary
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          if [ -f e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json ]; then
+            node -e "
+              const fs = require('fs');
+              const summary = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json', 'utf8'));
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`status=\${summary.status || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`service=\${summary.service || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`lane=\${summary.lane || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`channel=\${summary.channel || 'unknown'}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`testsRun=\${summary.testsRun ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`failures=\${summary.failures ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`errors=\${summary.errors ?? 0}\n\`);
+              fs.appendFileSync(process.env.GITHUB_OUTPUT, \`durationSeconds=\${summary.durationSeconds ?? 0}\n\`);
+            "
+          else
+            echo "status=missing" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "service=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "lane=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "channel=unknown" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "testsRun=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "failures=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "errors=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+            echo "durationSeconds=0" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Checkout qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          repository: JavierNaranjo-BD/qa-dashboards
+          token: ${{ secrets.QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN }}
+          ref: gh-pages
+          path: qa-dashboards
+
+      - name: Publish latest nightly summary and artifacts to qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          set -e
+
+          TARGET_DIR="qa-dashboards/latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly"
+          ARTIFACTS_DIR="$TARGET_DIR/artifacts"
+
+          mkdir -p "$ARTIFACTS_DIR"
+
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json "$TARGET_DIR/summary.json"
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md "$TARGET_DIR/summary.md"
+          cp e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html "$TARGET_DIR/summary.html"
+
+          if [ -f e2e/playwright/pact/results.json ]; then
+            cp e2e/playwright/pact/results.json "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/results.json"
+          fi
+
+          if [ -d playwright-report ]; then
+            rm -rf "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/playwright-report"
+            cp -R playwright-report "$ARTIFACTS_DIR/playwright-report"
+          fi
+
+      - name: Commit and push qa-dashboards
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        working-directory: qa-dashboards
+        shell: bash
+        env:
+          QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN }}
+        run: |
+          node ./scripts/build-latest-index.js
+
+          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+          git add latest/index.json
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/summary.json
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/summary.md
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/summary.html
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/artifacts/results.json
+          git add latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/artifacts/playwright-report
+          git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m "chore: update pact nightly latest for front-customer-workspace"
+          git remote set-url origin https://x-access-token:${QA_DASHBOARDS_PUSH_TOKEN}@github.com/JavierNaranjo-BD/qa-dashboards.git
+          git push origin HEAD:gh-pages
+
+      - name: Add scheduled summary
+        if: ${{ always() }}
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          {
+            echo "## Pact full run"
+            echo ""
+            echo "- Trigger: ${{ github.event_name }}"
+            echo "- Result: ${{ steps.pact_scheduled.outcome }}"

+            echo "- Channel: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.channel }}"
+            echo "- Tests run: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.testsRun }}"
+            echo "- Failures: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.failures }}"
+            echo "- Errors: ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.errors }}"
+            echo "- Duration (s): ${{ steps.pact_summary.outputs.durationSeconds }}"
+            echo "- Report artifact: playwright-report-full"
+            echo "- Pact artifact: pact-files-full"
+            echo "- Summary artifact: pact-summary-full"
+            echo "- Mirror path: latest/front-customer-workspace/pact/nightly/"
+          } >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: playwright-report-full
+          path: playwright-report/
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-files-full
+          path: e2e/playwright/pacts/
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: ${{ !cancelled() }}
+        with:
+          name: pact-summary-full
+          path: |
+            e2e/playwright/pact/results.json
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.json
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.md
+            e2e/playwright/pact/summary.html
+          if-no-files-found: warn
+          retention-days: 30
